description_long: This is a cylindrical ceramic cup with a white interior and a large, rounded handle. The exterior is predominantly decorated with a vibrant, full-color wraparound print featuring the cover art and characters from the video game Grand Theft Auto V, including the game's logo in the center. The print is bordered by a black band that frames the collage of images, giving the cup a bold and eye-catching appearance. The handle is plain white and smoothly integrated into the cup's body, providing a comfortable grip. The cup appears to be filled with a dark liquid, likely coffee or tea, visible from the top. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramic mugs.
description: A white ceramic cup with a large handle and a colorful Grand Theft Auto V artwork wraparound print, filled with a dark liquid. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a bold black border framing the artwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Grand Theft Auto V logo and main collage artwork, with the cup's interior and liquid visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handle and additional character artwork, with the handle on the right and more of the white ceramic visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focused on the plain white handle and the back of the cup, with minimal artwork visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the continuation of the artwork around the cup and part of the handle, with more character images visible.
